title: Zapier GET Metrics API Endpoint for MCP and AI Agent Integration
description:
Create a new Zapier-compatible GET endpoint to retrieve metrics, specifically designed for MCP (Model Context Protocol) integration so AI agents can query metrics.

### Endpoint
`GET /api/v1_0/zapier/metrics`

### Authentication
Bearer token

### Response
Returns an array of metric objects for the authenticated team, each containing: `id`, `name`, `created_at`, `description`, `date_field_name`, `dictionary_field_id`, `tableau_account_id`, and nested `aliases` (with `name`, `created_at`, `updated_at`).
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/v1_0/zapier/metrics returns metrics for the authenticated team
Response includes metric details and nested aliases
Endpoint is accessible via Bearer token authentication
Endpoint is registered as a Zapier tool
middleware_changes: New controller action for metrics retrieval via Zapier API.
api_changes: New GET endpoint `/api/v1_0/zapier/metrics` returning team-scoped metrics with aliases. Registered as a Zapier integration tool.
implementation_notes: This endpoint enables AI agents (via MCP) to query DataTools Pro metrics through Zapier. Bearer token authentication scopes data to the authenticated team.
comment_summary: Developer documented the endpoint specification with request/response format. Implemented the REST API endpoint and added it as a tool in the Zapier integration.
